allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const d = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const pdfKeys = Object.keys\(d\).filter\(k => k.includes\('pdf'\)\); console.log\(pdfKeys.map\(k => k+': '+d[k]\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next || p.devDependencies.next\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/pdfjs-dist/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({main: p.main, module: p.module, exports: Object.keys\(p.exports || {}\).slice\(0,10\)}, null, 2\)\);")
